title: ProvisionByoipCidrRequest
description: ProvisionByoipCidrRequest schema from Amazon Global Accelerator API

allOf.description: The public IPv4 address range, in CIDR notation. The most specific IP prefix that you can specify is /24. The address range cannot overlap with another address range that you've brought to this or another Region.
A signed document that proves that you are authorized to bring the specified IP address range to Amazon using BYOIP.
